title: Improve proposal execution UX: run-in-chat default, visibility, and command reliability
summary: Implement proposal workflow fixes so approved proposals execute in-chat by default, surface clear task linkage/status, and use reliable non-detached command execution with proper exit-code handling.
details:
Recreate the previously discussed proposal to improve proposal execution behavior and observability.

Scope:
1) Default approved proposals to execute in the current chat/session unless explicitly routed elsewhere.
2) Add clear linkage between proposal and background task IDs in UI/logs, including direct open/resume controls.
3) Improve queued/paused/stalled reason visibility so users can diagnose why execution is not progressing.
4) Replace detached validation command execution (e.g., `start cmd /k ...`) with attached, exit-code-aware execution for build/test validation.
5) Ensure completion is reported only after validation process exits successfully, otherwise surface failure details.

Acceptance criteria:
- Approving in-chat visibly runs in-chat by default (or clearly indicates reroute target).
- Users can locate the exact task from the proposal view in one click.
- Validation commands report deterministic pass/fail status and logs.

affectedFiles.description: Proposal approval routing and execution target defaults; metadata for linking.
Task linkage, status reasons, and visibility updates.
Command execution policy: attached mode + exit-code handling for validation.
UI surfacing of proposal-task mapping and execution progress.

diffPreview:
- Default executor dispatch from generic/background to current session when approval originates in active chat.
+ Persist `proposal_id -> task_id` mapping and display in proposal details.
- Use `start cmd /k "npm run build"` for validation.
+ Use direct process execution (`npm run build`, `npm test`) with awaited exit code and captured logs.
+ Fail proposal execution step when non-zero exit code encountered; show reason and next action.
estimatedImpact: Higher trust in proposal workflow, better debuggability, and fewer false-positive completions from detached command windows.
executorPrompt: Implement the approved proposal end-to-end: (1) make approved proposals execute in current chat/session by default, (2) add explicit proposal↔task linkage with clear UI/log surfaces and open/resume controls, (3) improve paused/queued/stalled reason visibility, and (4) enforce attached, exit-code-gated build/test command execution (no detached cmd /k) so completion only occurs after successful process exit. Update relevant gateway/task/tool-runner/terminal-ui sources, run build/tests, and report changed files with validation output.
